steps.title: Identify the unexpected pattern
steps.content: Belgium has strong democratic institutions and 2.12% inflation; Equatorial Guinea has weak institutions and 0.74% inflation. The research shows strong institutions tend to restrain inflation. Belgium's result contradicts this expectation.

steps.title: Find the word for unexpected results
steps.content: Anomalous fits—it means deviating from what is normal or standard. The other three do not: inexplicable overstates the mystery, unfounded misapplies to factual inflation rates, and facetious is the wrong tone. That is the correct answer.
